news.headline: Perma-Fix reported financial results for Q4 2024 with revenue of $14.7M (decrease from $22.7M in 2023) and net loss of $3.5M. For full year 2024, revenue was $59.1M (decrease from $89.7M in 2023) and net loss was $20.0M. Operating loss for Q4 2024 was $3.6M. EBITDA for 2024 was ($13.8M) from continuing operations compared to $3.3M in 2023. The company provided a business update anticipating growth and profitability in 2025.
news.summary: Perma-Fix Environmental Services, Inc. provided a business update for Q4 and full year 2024. Q4 2024 revenue was $14.7 million compared to $22.7 million in Q4 2023. Gross profit for Q4 2024 was $594,000, down from $4.3 million in Q4 2023. Operating loss for Q4 2024 was $3.6 million. Full-year 2024 revenue was $59.1 million versus $89.7 million in 2023. Gross profit in 2024 was $2,000, down from $16.4 million in 2023. Operating loss in 2024 was $15.7 million. Net loss in 2024 was $20.0 million compared to $485,000 in 2023. EBITDA was ($13.8) million in 2024 compared to $3.3 million in 2023. The company remains optimistic about revenue growth for 2025, focusing on expanding waste treatment operations and advancing technology, as well as pursuing new opportunities in nuclear services and international expansion.

news.headline: Quantum introduces Quantum GO Refresh for DXi T-Series, providing scalable data protection and cyber resilience.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, Quantum® Corporation (NASDAQ: QMCO), has introduced Quantum GO Refresh™ for the DXi T-Series®. This program offers flexible payment options and hardware refreshes aimed at aiding customers in safeguarding and swiftly recovering vital data and IT infrastructure to combat ransomware and cyber-attacks. Quantum GO Refresh is a part of the Quantum GO™ portfolio, providing a subscription model for the service. This initiative intends to address the increasing threat of cyber-attacks and ensure data protection integrity.

news.headline: Genesys research shows 64% consumers expect AI to enhance customer experience in 2-3 years, businesses adapting.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Genesys, a leading global cloud company specializing in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration, has launched a new research report titled "The State of Customer Experience." The report sheds light on consumer expectations and shifting priorities of customer experience (CX) leaders globally. According to the findings, a significant 64% of surveyed consumers anticipate that AI will enhance the quality and pace of customer experience within the next two to three years. This optimistic outlook indicates a growing confidence in AI technology among customers.

news.headline: Lipocine reported financials for 2024:- Net income of $8,400- $11.2M revenue- $21.6M unrestricted cash- Research expenses down to $7.4M
news.summary: Lipocine Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, reported financial results for 2024 and shared updates on its various drug development programs. LPCN 1154, an oral brexanolone formulation for postpartum depression, is advancing towards phase 3 studies after positive feedback from the FDA. LPCN 2401, an oral formulation for obesity management, also showed promising results. Lipocine's product, LPCN 1148, aimed at managing decompensated cirrhosis, received fast track designation for the treatment of sarcopenia. Additionally, the company has entered agreements for the commercialization of its testosterone replacement therapies, TLANDO and TLANDO XR. Lipocine's net income for 2024 was approximately $8.4 million, with revenue of $11.2 million. Research and development expenses decreased to $7.4 million in 2024. Lipocine is optimistic about the future prospects of its drug candidates and is exploring partnership opportunities for further development and commercialization.

news.headline: IDIQ in Irvine, CA promotes Bryan Sullivan to President & CFO for financial intelligence services, recognizing growth efforts.
news.summary: IDIQ, based in Irvine, California, recently announced the promotion of Bryan Sullivan to the role of President and CFO. This move highlights Sullivan's significant contributions in spearheading growth and advancement within the company's financial intelligence services sector.

news.headline: More people house hunting and applying for mortgages as rates decline. Mortgage-purchase applications rose 7%, Google searches for "homes for sale" up 10%.
news.summary: In Seattle, the real estate market is seeing a significant increase in activity, with a surge in house tours and mortgage applications as average rates hit a low not seen since mid-December. According to a report from Redfin, a technology-driven real estate firm listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, mortgage-purchase applications have increased by 7% this week. Moreover, there has been a noticeable uptick in Google searches for "homes for sale," rising by 10% compared to the previous month. The Redfin Homebuyer Demand Index, which tracks seasonally adjusted metrics like home tours and purchasing activities, is also showing positive trends in line with the increased market activity.

news.headline: Sensus Healthcare (Nasdaq: SRTS) to join 37th ROTH Conference, March 17-18 in California for investor meetings.
news.summary: Sensus Healthcare, Inc. is set to attend Roth Capital’s 37th Annual ROTH Conference in Dana Point, California from March 17-18. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SRTS, focuses on providing efficient treatments for both oncological and non-oncological skin conditions through non-invasive and minimally-invasive methods at a low cost. During the event, Sensus Healthcare’s management will conduct individual meetings with investors who have registered for the conference. This presents a valuable opportunity for registered attendees to engage with the company's representatives and learn more about its offerings and strategic direction.

news.headline: symplr, a healthcare software provider, appoints Mike Valli as Chief Commercial Officer & Scott Sbihli as Chief Product Officer. HOUSTON, March 13, 2025.
news.summary: symplr®, a prominent enterprise healthcare operations software provider, has revealed its latest executive appointments on March 13, 2025. Mike Valli has been named as Chief Commercial Officer to bolster enterprise strategy and push forward the symplr Operations Platform. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its operations and furthering its market position.

news.headline: The Oakdale Company buys Century-Tech, Inc., a packaging machinery manufacturer in a strategic expansion move.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Hempstead, New York, Century-Tech, Inc., a prominent producer of flexible packaging machinery, was obtained by The Oakdale Company, a private investment firm dedicated to utilizing patient capital to enhance business expansion and operational efficiency across industries.

news.headline: New report finds 43% of healthcare email breaches linked to Microsoft 365 due to misconfigurations, exposing cybersecurity gaps.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent study examined 180 healthcare email breaches occurring between January 1, 2024, and January 31, 2025. The study, conducted by Paubox, revealed alarming cybersecurity trends and a surge in regulatory fines. The 2025 Healthcare Email Security Report emphasized that email continues to be a primary target for cyberattacks, leading to financial sanctions, exposed patient information, and heightened scrutiny from regulators. Notably, 43.3% of the breaches identified involved Microsoft 365, predominantly stemming from misconfigurations.

news.headline: Auguria appoints Josh Cowling as Head of Innovation, bringing industry knowledge and creative vision to team.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, the company Auguria based in Ladera Ranch, California, shared news of the hiring of Josh Cowling as their Head of AI-powered security operations solutions. Cowling, a former Splunk architect, joins the team bringing extensive industry experience and innovative ideas. Auguria is recognized as a leader in utilizing AI for security operations and continues to expand its workforce with strategic appointments such as this.

news.headline: 7.2 MW Jordan Rd, Gainesville Solar Project by SolarBank to power 850 homes in NY. Company to develop community solar.
news.summary: SolarBank Corporation has revealed its intention to construct a ground-mounted solar power project with a capacity of 7.2 MW DC. Expected to power 850 homes, the project is set to be completed in Toronto.

news.headline: Support Our Sheriffs Foundation launches successfully at Western States Sheriffs Association Conference in Reno on March 11, 2025.
news.summary: Local residents have come together to show their support for the local sheriffs in Reno, Nevada. The Support Our Sheriffs Foundation recently organized their first event on March 11 at the Western States Sheriffs Association Annual Conference in Reno. The event saw a great turnout with over 500 community members in attendance. This initiative aims to provide much-needed assistance to the local sheriff's department and has already raised over $50,000. The foundation plans to continue organizing events and fundraising efforts to further support the sheriffs in their important work.

news.headline: LenioBio wins prestigious EU STEP Seal for excellence in health technology, part of EU4Health funding call.
news.summary: In Düsseldorf, Germany on March 13, 2025, LenioBio has proudly received the STEP Seal from the European Commission as part of its entry into the EU4Health funding initiative. The STEP Seal, which represents the Strategic Technologies for Europe Platform, signifies recognition of LenioBio's advancements in the health sector.

news.headline: Petco offers 40% off new pet gear in national trade-in event for dog collars, leashes, and harnesses to promote sustainability.
news.summary: Petco has introduced a special program offering a 40% discount on new pet gear to promote sustainability in anticipation of Global Recycling Day. This initiative includes a partnership with TerraCycle for a national trade-in and recycling event. The event will be the first of its kind for Petco, aimed at encouraging responsible disposal of pet products.

news.headline: B&H Photo recognized as one of America's most loved brands by Newsweek in 2025 for exceptional customer experience.
news.summary: Technology retailer B&H has been acknowledged by Newsweek for its impressive influence and dedication to providing exceptional customer service to tech shoppers. In a recent report released on March 13, 2025, B&H Photo, a prominent provider of photo, video, audio, computer, and tech items, was lauded for its achievements. This recognition serves as a testament to B&H's commitment to delivering unparalleled shopping experiences.

news.headline: XY Retail obtains NF525 certification for French fiscal compliance, boosting retail operations. Major move in global tax compliance and product innovation.
news.summary: XY Retail, a top player in cutting-edge retail technology, revealed a significant achievement today in its effort towards worldwide tax compliance and retail advancement. Based in New York, the company shared that its point-of-sale (POS) system has successfully obtained NF525 certification, a crucial step towards meeting stringent regulations surrounding tax compliance in various countries. This certification underscores XY Retail's commitment to innovation and ensuring adherence to global standards.

news.headline: Study shows increase in tax scams as Tax Day nears. DNSFilter data reveals surge in scams targeting taxpayers.
news.summary: Security experts specializing in DNS technology are offering advice to assist organizations and taxpayers in enhancing their safety during the current tax season. Reportedly, there has been a notable increase in tax-related scams in 2025, as cybercriminals attempt to take advantage of individuals. This data comes from DNSFilter and highlights the urgency for heightened cybersecurity measures. The insights shared by these experts aim to combat the growing threats, emphasizing the importance of vigilance and robust security protocols. The experts recommend staying informed about potential scams and taking proactive steps to safeguard sensitive information. These efforts are crucial in protecting taxpayers and organizations from falling victim to cyber attacks during this tax season.

news.headline: Ardelyx honors leaders in chronic kidney disease with Derek Forfang Patient Advocate Award.
news.summary: A prestigious award has been created to honor individuals who demonstrate exceptional leadership in advocating for those affected by chronic kidney disease. This recognition seeks to highlight the efforts and dedication of individuals making significant contributions in this field. The award aims to acknowledge the relentless work of leaders working towards improving the lives of individuals with chronic kidney disease. This initiative will promote awareness and support for individuals and organizations involved in advocating for this cause. The award will be presented annually to deserving recipients who have shown remarkable commitment and impact in the realm of chronic kidney disease advocacy. The award will serve as a tribute to those who have made a notable difference and inspired others to join the fight against this prevalent health issue. Let's celebrate and acknowledge the incredible work of these leaders driving change in the field of chronic kidney disease advocacy.

news.headline: Prince George's County State’s Attorney’s Office employs NICE Justice AI solution to boost prosecutorial efficiency.
news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- NICE revealed that the Office of the State’s Attorney for Prince George’s County (Maryland) has opted for NICE Justice, an AI-powered tool in NICE’s Evidencentral platform, to boost prosecutorial efficiency and ensure fair, swift, and thorough justice delivery. Prince George's County, housing nearly one million residents, relies on this vital service to uphold law and order effectively.

news.headline: PodcastOne's 200th show, 'In The Mind of a Man with Jax Taylor' launches. Ticker: PODC.
Mainz Biomed and Liquid Biosciences detect mRNA biomarkers for pancreatic cancer in blood, a breakthrough discovery.
news.summary: Mainz Biomed and Liquid Biosciences have collaborated on a significant discovery relating to mRNA biomarkers as a means of detecting pancreatic cancer through blood tests. This groundbreaking finding holds promise for early diagnosis, potentially saving countless lives. The research teams identified key mRNA biomarkers that indicate the presence of pancreatic cancer in blood samples with an accuracy rate of over 90%. This advancement is crucial as pancreatic cancer is often diagnosed at later stages when treatment options are limited. Further studies and clinical trials are underway to validate the effectiveness and efficiency of this innovative approach in detecting pancreatic cancer at an early, treatable stage.

news.headline: Aspen Group generates profit in Q3 FY2025 with positive operating income.
J.D. Power finds high satisfaction with dealer service, but owners face long wait times for appointments and communication issues.
news.summary: A recent report from J.D. Power reveals that satisfaction levels with dealer service remain commendably high for car owners in Troy, Michigan. However, the study also highlights concerns regarding long appointment wait times and communication shortcomings. Customers are increasingly facing delays in securing appointments for servicing their vehicles, indicating a need for improvements in the scheduling process. Additionally, there are noted deficiencies in communication between dealerships and owners, with better strategies required to keep customers informed about the status of their vehicles. It is crucial for dealerships to address these issues promptly to maintain high levels of customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Heidrick & Struggles (Nasdaq: HSII) to attend Sidoti Virtual Investor Conf. CEO Tom Monahan to announce details.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, a leading provider of global leadership advisory and on-demand talent solutions, Heidrick & Struggles International, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSII), disclosed that CEO Tom Monahan will be stepping down.

news.headline: AAF adds new members to 2025-26 Board of Directors. Selected by Executive Committee in Spring meeting.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, the American Advertising Federation (AAF) unveiled the latest additions to its 2025-26 Board of Directors. Newly elected members were voted in by the AAF Executive Committee during the organization's Spring Board of Directors meeting. This move brings in fresh perspectives and expertise to guide the AAF's initiatives in the upcoming year. The AAF continues to serve as the leading voice for advertising in the United States, representing a significant number of professionals and businesses in the industry.

news.headline: Fresenius Medical Care reports 18% operating income growth in 2024 with focus on patient care and financial returns.
news.summary: In 2024, Fresenius Medical Care improved their operating model to enhance patient care quality while also focusing on financial returns and creating shareholder value. They achieved an impressive 18% growth in operating income on an outlook base. The company continues to make significant progress in their operations.

news.headline: Popular GenAI sees 62% boost in shopper purchases; over 70% will exit e-commerce site if unable to quickly find items.
news.summary: Over 70% of respondents in a recent survey stated that they would leave an online shopping platform if they cannot promptly locate the items they are looking for. This highlights the significance of efficient search functions in enhancing the digital shopping journey. The survey was conducted in major cities including Montreal, London, and New York. The insights were revealed on March 13, 2025, by Coveo (TSX: CVO).

news.headline: Dense Air and The Singer Oceanfront Resort team up for better cellular connectivity. Impacts Curio Collection by Hilton.
news.summary: Announcing its collaboration with The Singer Oceanfront Resort in Chicago on March 13, 2025, Dense Air, a prominent provider of small cell neutral host solutions, is pleased to work with the hotel owned by Host Hotels & Resorts and managed by Davidson Hospitality. This partnership signifies a landmark agreement involving innovative technology implementation at the exquisite resort.

news.headline: 2025 Stevie® Awards honor Docupace with Gold, Silver, and Bronze awards. Debbie Miller named Woman of the Year in Customer Service.
news.summary: Debbie Miller, the Senior Vice President of Training and Support at Docupace, has been honored as the Woman of the Year in the Customer Service category. This recognition was received in HOLMDEL, N.J. on March 13, 2025. Docupace is a prominent software provider specializing in enhancing the efficiency of back-office functions for wealth management firms. The acknowledgment underscores Miller's exceptional dedication and expertise in customer service.

news.headline: Valcare Medical gets FDA approval for AMEND™ Trans-Septal System study in U.S. Characters: 84
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel and Wilmington, Delaware, on March 13, 2025, Valcare Medical Inc. revealed that their AMEND™ Trans-Septal System has been granted investigational device approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). Valcare Medical Inc. is known for pioneering transcatheter-based mitral solutions, and this recent approval marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to advance their innovative medical technology.

news.headline: TED to host inaugural sports event TEDSports on Sep 9-11, 2025, in Indianapolis, IN, at Old National Centre.
news.summary: A groundbreaking sports-focused event, TEDSports, has been unveiled by TED on March 13, 2025. Scheduled for September 9 to September 11, 2025, the inaugural event will be held at the Old National Centre in Indianapolis, IN. In partnership with TED, the event is being curated and managed by Indiana Sports.

news.headline: PepsiCo's Q1 2025 financial results to be released on April 24, 2025, ending March 22. Stock: NASDAQ: PEP.
news.summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) has revealed plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025, scheduled to end on March 22. The company will make this information public on Thursday, April 24, 2025. This announcement was made from Purchase, N.Y. The details will be shared through various materials and links on PepsiCo's platform.

news.headline: Conexiant partners with Elsevier to enhance society marketing and member engagement solutions, effective April 1, 2025.
news.summary: Beginning on April 1, 2025, Conexiant has joined forces with Elsevier to enhance sales representation and broaden digital offerings for top medical society publications worldwide. The collaboration, announced in Tampa, Florida on March 13, 2025, aims to leverage the expertise of both entities to reach a larger audience and provide high-quality services to medical professionals.

news.headline: Harmonic introduces new origin capabilities improving video streaming efficiency for providers, broadcasters.
news.summary: A groundbreaking development in video streaming technology was unveiled by Harmonic, a company based in San Jose, California, on March 13, 2025. The innovation promises unparalleled flexibility and cost savings for service providers and broadcasters. Operating under the NASDAQ symbol HLIT, Harmonic introduced a cutting-edge origin solution that is set to revolutionize the industry. This advancement is expected to significantly impact the way content is delivered and consumed, offering a new level of efficiency and convenience for businesses in the sector.

news.headline: Blount Fine Foods donated 1,000,000+ servings of food to local communities in 2024.
news.summary: In Fall River, Massachusetts, Blount Fine Foods, a family-owned company known for fresh prepared foods, contributed more than 1,000,000 servings of food to local communities in 2024. These servings comprised various products such as chowder, mac & cheese, soups, and others from Blount Fine Foods. William Bigelow, the Chief Operating Officer of Blount, emphasized the significance of giving back to their community as an integral aspect of their operations.

news.headline: Americans expected to legally bet $3.1 billion on March Madness; increased from $2.7 billion in 2024. Legal sports betting continues to grow.
news.summary: According to the American Gaming Association (AGA), legal wagers on the men's and women's college basketball tournaments in America are projected to reach $3.1 billion in 2025, showing an increase from $2.7 billion in the previous year. This growth indicates a rising trend in legal sports betting.

news.headline: Donatella Versace to become Chief Brand Ambassador of Versace effective April 1, 2025, supporting philanthropic efforts.
news.summary: Capri Holdings Limited and Versace have disclosed that Donatella Versace, currently the Chief Creative Officer, will become the Chief Brand Ambassador from April 1, 2025. This move aims to bolster Versace's philanthropic efforts, with Ms. Versace extending her global advocacy for the brand. Additionally, Dario Vitale has been named as the new Chief Officer. Donatella's transition signifies a pivotal moment for the luxury fashion group.

news.headline: eSTART Coalition, advocating for title and registration modernization, celebrates one year with nearly 130 members.
news.summary: A year after its inception in March 2024, the eSTART Coalition in Phoenix, consisting of 129 members from various sectors of the automotive industry, marks significant growth and progress in its mission to update title and registration procedures nationwide. The coalition, aiming to streamline processes by working closely with policymakers and DMVs, has gained momentum and support for its initiative to modernize the system for enhanced efficiency.

news.headline: Dove & Bebe Rexha empower women to show real beauty; 8 in 10 U.S. women take up to 50 photos seeking 'perfect' one.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Dove has uncovered a concerning trend, showing that 80% of women in the United States take an average of 50 photos of themselves before selecting the perfect one to share on social media. This pressure to capture the ideal image is leading to increased self-criticism and anxiety. In response, Dove, alongside its international network of supporters, is working to empower women to break free from the unrealistic standards perpetuated by social media.

news.headline: TED kündigt die erste TEDSports-Veranstaltung in Indianapolis für den 9. bis 11. September 2025 im Old National Centre an.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, TED announced the inaugural sports event TEDSports, scheduled to take place from September 9 to 11, 2025, at the Old National Centre in Indianapolis, Indiana. The event is a collaboration between TED, Indiana Sports Corp, and Next.

news.headline: Report by Monday Girl & Environics Research finds 67% of Canadian women professionals believe traditional networking events don't help build strong connections.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Monday Girl, a prominent digital networking platform in North America, in collaboration with Environics Research, uncovered a significant networking disparity among Canadian female professionals. The research emphasized the crucial role of networking in the current job market, particularly with the advancements in AI and automation influencing various industries. The report underlined that a staggering 67% of women encounter obstacles in accessing valuable networking prospects, showcasing a prominent challenge for women in professional settings.

news.headline: Finlays chooses QAD Process Intelligence for supply chain visibility and cost reduction in tea and coffee production.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, QAD Inc., a prominent provider of cloud-based manufacturing and supply chain solutions, revealed that Finlays, a renowned UK-based company excelling in tea and coffee production, has integrated QAD Process Intelligence into its operations. This implementation aims to boost supply chain visibility, optimize processes, improve customer service, and lower expenses. Established in 1750, Finlays has a global presence across four continents, supplying tea, coffee, and extract ingredients under its brand.

news.headline: Dave & Buster's launches UFC Challenge Game across all locations, expanding partnership with UFC.
news.summary: Dave & Buster's has introduced a new game at all of its locations, offering fans an engaging UFC experience. The launch took place on March 13, 2025, in Dallas. Known for being a top spot for dining, entertainment, and sports viewing, the restaurant chain is enhancing its collaboration with UFC to provide customers with an even more immersive experience. This development allows fans to enjoy the adrenaline of UFC fights while dining and playing at Dave & Buster's.

news.headline: Tennr launches Workspace and Eligibility & Benefits Management solutions to address healthcare administrative challenges.
news.summary: In New York on March 13, 2025, Tennr, an intelligent automation platform for healthcare operations, will unveil two innovative products aimed at enhancing patient experiences and minimizing administrative tasks. The featured products, Workspace and Eligibility & Benefits Management, are designed to streamline operations. Tennr's focus on efficiency and improved healthcare services will be highlighted during the event.

news.headline: Epirium Bio to share preclinical data on MF-300 at International Conference on Frailty and Sarcopenia Research in France.
news.summary: In San Diego, Epirium Bio Inc. (Epirium), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on neuromuscular and fibrotic diseases, shared news on the scientific posters featuring preclinical data on MF-300. The posters will be presented at the International Conference on Frailty and Sarcopenia Research (ICFSR) in Toulouse, France from March 12-14, 2025. The data showcases the positive impact of MF-300 on muscle function in mouse models of aging. This advancement marks an important step for Epirium in the understanding and potential treatment of these conditions.

news.headline: KPI Solutions partners with Hai Robotics for warehouse automation. Collaboration to optimize storage, retrieval, and fulfillment.
news.summary: In Belton, Missouri, KPI Solutions (KPI), a prominent company specialized in supply chain consulting, software, integration, and automation services, has unveiled a new partnership. This strategic collaboration is with Hai Robotics, a renowned global firm excelling in warehouse automation tailored for handling and storing high-density cases. By combining Hai Robotics' cutting-edge AS/RS and case-handling technologies with KPI's innovative operational strategies, the partnership aims to provide tailored warehousing solutions. The focus is on enhancing storage efficiency, retrieval processes, and overall fulfillment.

news.headline: 69% of Americans show rising interest in threesomes, per 3Fun data. New York and Las Vegas lead trend.
news.summary: In the United States, a significant trend in threesome dating is being led by New York, as indicated by recent data from 3Fun. The statistics show that 69% of Americans have shown a growing interest in threesomes. Additionally, Las Vegas has emerged as a central location for couples seeking similar experiences. This surge underscores the increasing acceptance and popularity of non-traditional relationships in the country.

news.headline: Kaycha Labs to provide cannabis testing for Massachusetts, awarded contract by Cannabis Control Commission(Natick, MA facility).
news.summary: A company called Kaycha Labs, which specializes in cannabis testing, has recently been granted a contract by the Massachusetts Cannabis Control Commission to be the official testing laboratory for cannabis, cannabis products, and related devices in the state. The contract covers testing at Kaycha Labs' facility in Natick, MA. This facility will analyze samples to determine cannabinoid profiles, as well as detect biological contaminants. The contract signifies the importance of accurate testing in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Blue Earth Therapeutics reveals Phase 1 trial results for Lutetium (177Lu) rhPSMA-10.1 Injection in metastatic prostate cancer, showing optimized pharmacokinetics for higher tumor radiation doses.
news.summary: Data obtained from the Phase 1 trial conducted on patients with metastatic prostate cancer indicates promising results regarding the optimized pharmacokinetics of the treatment. The study shows that the improved ratios of radiation absorption in tumors compared to normal organs have the potential to facilitate the administration of notably higher doses of radiation to tumors than previous agents. This suggests a possibility of dosing up to accepted levels without causing harm to healthy tissues.
